queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS `numrows` FROM `users` LEFT JOIN `education` as `education` ON `education`.`id`=`users`.`highestdegree` LEFT JOIN `occupation` as `occupation` ON `occupation`.`id`=`users`.`occupation` LEFT JOIN `religion` as `religion` ON `religion`.`id`=`users`.`religion` LEFT JOIN `caste` as `caste` ON `caste`.`id`=`users`.`caste` LEFT JOIN `languages` as `languages` ON `languages`.`id`=`users`.`mothertongue` LEFT JOIN `states` as `states` ON `states`.`id`=`users`.`state` WHERE `users`.`status` = '1' AND `users`.`role` = '2' AND `register_by` = 'website'

SELECT `users`.*, `education`.`name` as `education_name`, `occupation`.`name` as `occupation_name`, `religion`.`name` as `religion_name`, `caste`.`name` as `caste_name`, `languages`.`name` as `mothertongue_name`, `states`.`name` as `state_name` FROM `users` LEFT JOIN `education` as `education` ON `education`.`id`=`users`.`highestdegree` LEFT JOIN `occupation` as `occupation` ON `occupation`.`id`=`users`.`occupation` LEFT JOIN `religion` as `religion` ON `religion`.`id`=`users`.`religion` LEFT JOIN `caste` as `caste` ON `caste`.`id`=`users`.`caste` LEFT JOIN `languages` as `languages` ON `languages`.`id`=`users`.`mothertongue` LEFT JOIN `states` as `states` ON `states`.`id`=`users`.`state` WHERE `users`.`status` = '1' AND `users`.`role` = '2' AND `register_by` = 'website' ORDER BY `users`.`id` DESC LIMIT 12
